name: claude-provenance
description: Claude Code plugin: the legacy v0.3 in-session citation Stop hook and slash commands. Every factual claim needs a source or an explicit [CITE NEEDED], logged to a portable ledger. The full WarrantOS pipeline (CLI, MCP server, four-state verdict, attestation) installs separately from PyPI as `warrantos`; wiring the WarrantOS surfaces into the plugin is a later item.
